entries.current_position: RP-C06-M01 through M04, M06, and M07 are PROVEN; AJ-09 and CAP-019/CAP-020 are accepted. RP-C06-M05 is PARTIAL at the exact missing distinct-identity hosted PR-collision rejection. RP-C01 blockers remain unchanged and independent.
blockers: RP-C01-M02 fresh Work/Athena-native Phoenix Blade control is unproven.
RP-C01-M05 Arrow/Spear byte and receipt parity is not proven end to end.
RP-C01-M06 protected-path handoff detection is proven, but protected execution was not run.
RP-C01-M07 the live rejection matrix is partial; the full fail-closed fallback set is unproven.
RP-C01-M08 routine Jayson carrier dependency retirement is unproven.
RP-C06-M05 needs one fresh distinct-identity hosted dispatch to reject on an already-open generated-checkpoint PR before mutation.
entries.next_action: After this authored acceptance merges, run its generated refresh through a fresh GENERATED_CHECKPOINT_V1 mission; while that draft PR is open, use a second fresh identity to prove PR-collision rejection before mutation.
entries.next_approval: Exact-head Ubuntu and Windows CI, detached review, canonical readback, and a separate authored M05 closure are required before RP-C06 can complete.
